name: okun-workbench-stock-feed-guard
notes: Module 2d: the one fully autonomous SSF workflow — no cap, no approval gate, because it only ends listings, never spends or publishes. 'Daily minimum, target: every relist cycle' per spec — set to every 4h here as a reasonable relist-cycle cadence; tighten if EJ wants faster coverage. Requires OKUN_WORKBENCH_URL and OKUN_DIGEST_SECRET env vars on the n8n instance (same secret as the digest workflow). Reuses DIGEST_SECRET as the auth header on both endpoints rather than minting a second secret.
